title: Required Fees for Overseas Employment Certificate (OEC) Registration
content:
The following are the required fees to be paid by the Overseas Filipino Worker (OFW) to register and secure the Overseas Employment Certificate (OEC):

- OWWA Contribution/Membership Fee: PHP 1,275.00 (on a per contract basis)
- Medicare Coverage Premium (One year): PHP 900.00 (Premium may be paid to OWWA or PHILHEALTH)
- POEA Processing Fee: PHP 100.00

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
